project.name: DB Migrations — Flyway SQL Scripts
project.description:
Single source of truth for all Flyway SQL migration scripts. No Java code — just SQL resources packaged into a JAR so that any module adding this as a Maven dependency will automatically have all migrations on its classpath at db/migration/*.sql.
Versioning: V1–V9 — core trading system tables (owned by this project) V100 — api_tokens (shared with upstox-auth, uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS)
To add a new migration: drop a new Vn__description.sql here. Do NOT duplicate SQL files in individual agent modules.
